Agent Fox

Choose by task, not filename.
Recommended for ordinary chat: ⚡ Fast Text. Selecting a profile changes only the pending choice; FOXAI never starts, stops, restarts, or silently switches the running engi

Command Center Foundation

One command screen for the major Kayock Command OS foundations: Repair Shop, Recovery, Build, Environment, Portable readiness, Models, Scan Bridge, Project Docs, and Extensions.

Command Center Controls

Rhyme & Rhythm Coach

Check stanza shape before rewriting anything. FOXAI estimates syllables, identifies spelling-based rhyme families, and shows where line lengths drift. Use your ear as the final judge.

Analysis and revision are separate. Changing the target below does not alter the analysis. It changes the instruction used after you pres

Chapter Draft Workspace

Read-only workspace that turns saved chapter cards into prose drafting briefs, beat sheets, continuity guardrails, and model-ready writing prompts.

Draft Workspace Controls

Draft Continue Workspace

Read-only workspace that uses the latest saved draft, chapter card, metadata, evidence, and version history to build continuation briefs and model-ready continuation prompts.

Continue Workspace Controls

PromptSmith

Build, organize, save, search, and send prompts into the Mission Console. Stored locally in the FOXAI Prompts folder.

Prompt Workshop

Title
Category

ServiceChecking
Local modelChecking
Documents—
Indexed pages—
Shelves—
Saved research—

Ready for a safe check

Repair Bay can check FOXAI and Windows without changing files, settings, services, models, or launchers.

READY

For experienced users: full evidence, launcher mapping, engineering tools, and proposal-only repair controls. Nothing repairs itself silently; any real change still requires an exact plan, snapshot, approval, validation, and receipt.

🩺

Check FOXAI Status

Refresh the current engine, model, library, project, and Creative Studio status without changing anything.

🧑‍🔧

Explain a Different Problem

Open Engineer manually for a problem that did not come from the health scan.

Guarded Repair Handoff

Select one finding and prepare a structured handoff for Engineer. Repair Bay itself cannot repair anything.

PLAN ONLY
Engineer receives the selected finding, evidence, affected paths, proposed action, backup requirement, and safety limits. Sending the handoff stages planning only; it never applies a repair.
<details class="card wide repairAdvancedTools"><summary>Engineering and technical tools</summary><div class=repairAdvancedBody>
Inspection and readiness

Extension Manager

Inventory, health, and guarded optional-extension state. Phase 2 keeps discovery passive and requires an exact preview plus typed operator approval before any state override is written.

Inventory &
Required / core / department state is blocked

Folder Scan Bridge

Read-only folder scanner. Kayock scans allowed FOXAI folders, creates a safe report, then the Mission Console can send that report to the local model.

Scan Control

Folder / Path / Key
Max Files<

Model receives summary/report path

Ignored Folders

node_modules

Project Manifest + README Generator

Generate safe project documentation from discovered modules and scan reports. Preview first, then write with backup.

Documentation Status

Documentation status not checked yet.

Build Verification Lite

Report-only verification. Checks manifests, docs, expected paths, scan summaries, and Python compile status without modifying project files.

Verification Control

Environment + Dependency Verification

Report-only environment check. Verifies Python runtime, optional Repair Bay imports, Node/npm presence, key folders, models, BAT files, and report paths.

Environment Control

Runtime Lock + Portable Readiness

Checks whether Kayock is actually running from the portable FOXAI runtime and identifies what still blocks USB workstation readiness.

Portable Readiness Control

Model Duplicate Truth Check

Separates true duplicate GGUF files from Windows folder casing aliases. Generates a cleanup plan without deleting or moving anything.

Model Check Control

User-Approved Repair Bay Actions

Low-risk action mode. Build a plan first, then apply one confirmed action at a time with logs and backups.

Action Control

Repair Bay Action History

Audit trail for user-approved Repair Bay actions. Review logs, targets, backups, success/failure counts, and post-action verification before expanding repair powers.

History Control

Post-Restore Audit Viewer

Read-only audit view for completed restore actions, live-target backups, verification reports, and current target hash state.

Timeline Control
